title: BeneficiaryAnchorUpdatedEvent
description: Payload of BNK.RLVR.RVT.SUP.002.BENEFICIARY_ANCHOR_UPDATED — emitted on every accepted state transition of an AGG.SUP.002.BEN.IDENTITY_ANCHOR. Carries the full post-transition snapshot plus the monotonic revision and the transition_kind discriminator. For PSEUDONYMISED transitions, the four PII fields are null (crypto-shredded by the aggregate).

internal_id.description: Stable anchor identifier, immutable, never recycled (per ADR-TECH-STRAT-007).

last_name.description: PII — null when transition_kind is PSEUDONYMISED.

revision.description: Monotonic counter on the aggregate; consumers use (internal_id, revision) for last-write-wins reconciliation.

command_id.description: Caller-supplied command_id of the command that produced this transition. For MINTED transitions, this is the client_request_id; for the other transitions it is the command_id.

right_exercise_id.description: Set only for PSEUDONYMISED transitions — links to the upstream right-to-be-forgotten request.

occurred_at.description: Wall-clock timestamp of the transition at the aggregate.

Actor.description: Principal that issued the command which produced this BNK.RLVR.RVT. Derived at the producer from the authentication context per ADR-TECH-STRAT-003 (REST bearer-token JWT). System-emitted events (e.g. outbox replay, scheduled jobs) use kind=system. Service-to-service calls authenticated via a service principal use kind=service with the capability id as subject.

kind.description: Classifier — drives audit / observability filters and lets PRJ.ANCHOR_HISTORY distinguish operator actions from automated ones.

subject.description: kind=human: UUIDv7 of the user (the JWT `sub` claim). kind=service: capability id of the caller (e.g. BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.001.RET). kind=system: a stable token identifying the system process (e.g. `system:outbox-replay`, `system:scheduler:retention-purge`).

on_behalf_of.description: Optional UUIDv7 of the end-user a system / service acted for (e.g. PSEUDONYMISE issued by BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.001.RET on behalf of the data subject). Null when the action is purely administrative.

message_id.description: UUIDv7 of THIS bus message (per ADR-TECH-STRAT-007 Rule 4).

emitted_at.description: Wall-clock timestamp at the producer outbox.

correlation_id.description: UUIDv7 of the originating business operation; equals internal_id for events whose root operation is anchor-scoped.

actor.description: Principal that issued the command which produced this RVT (per ADR-TECH-STRAT-003). Sourced into PRJ.ANCHOR_HISTORY.actor by the projection consumer.

causation_id.description: UUIDv7 of the immediate cause (the command_id of the accepted command).
